SEARCH
Package edu.ncsu.csc316.dsa.map

Class SkipListMap<K extends Comparable<K>,V>

java.lang.Object
edu.ncsu.csc316.dsa.map.AbstractMap<K,V>
edu.ncsu.csc316.dsa.map.AbstractOrderedMap<K,V>
edu.ncsu.csc316.dsa.map.SkipListMap<K,V>
Type Parameters:
K - the type of keys stored in the map
V - the type of values that are associated with keys in the map
All Implemented Interfaces:
Map<K,V>, Iterable<K>
public class SkipListMap<K extends Comparable<K>,V> extends AbstractOrderedMap<K,V>
A SkipListMap is an ordered (meaning entries are stored in a sorted order based on the keys of the entries) linked-memory representation of the Map abstract data type. This link-based map maintains several levels of linked lists to help approximate the performance of binary search using a linked-memory structure. SkipListMap ensures a O(logn) expected/average runtime for lookUps, insertions, and deletions. The SkipListMap class is based on algorithms developed for use with the textbook: Data Structures and Algorithms in Java, Sixth Edition Michael T. Goodrich, Roberto Tamassia, and Michael H. Goldwasser John Wiley and Sons, 2014
Author:
Dr. King, Diya Patel

    Nested classes/interfaces inherited from interface edu.ncsu.csc316.dsa.map.Map

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    SkipListMap()
    Constructs a new SkipListMap where keys of entries are compared based on their natural ordering based on Comparable.compareTo(T)
    SkipListMap(Comparator<K> compare)
    Constructs a new SkipListMap where keys of entries are compared based on a provided Comparator

    • SkipListMap

      public SkipListMap()
      Constructs a new SkipListMap where keys of entries are compared based on their natural ordering based on Comparable.compareTo(T)

    • SkipListMap

      public SkipListMap(Comparator<K> compare)
      Constructs a new SkipListMap where keys of entries are compared based on a provided Comparator
      Parameters:
      compare - a Comparator that defines comparisons rules for keys in the map

  • Method Details

    • get

      public V get(K key)
      gets the value at the key
      Parameters:

      Returns:
      value the value at the key

      public V put(K key, V value)
      inserts the entry in the list

      value - the value of the entry
      Returns:
      originalValue the orginal value at the node

    • remove

      public V remove(K key)
      returns the value removed
      Parameters:
      key - the key of the entry to remove from the map
      Returns:
      originalValue the value at the key

      returns the size of the list
